title: Student Outcomes & Institutional Analytics
description: Monitor student enrolment, retention rates, assessment performance, faculty workload, and course completion across departments.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

sampleData.description: 5,000 student records with programme, enrolment date, cohort, and demographics
20,000 course enrolment records with status and completion flag
80,000 assessment results with score, grade, and attempt number
200 faculty records with department, role, and course load

fabricItems.name: education_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all education analytics data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean data, derive GPA, pass/fail flags, retention risk scores, and faculty load bands

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: cohort outcomes, course performance, retention analysis, faculty workload, weekly trends, student scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL views: executive summary, at-risk students, course pass rates, faculty performance

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, retention trends, and department comparison

fabricItems.name: education_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model with student outcomes, retention, and faculty workload measures

fabricItems.name: Student Outcomes Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Student Outcomes, Course Performance, Faculty & Resources

fabricItems.name: daily_education_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates all notebooks sequentially with retry
